pattern: When unlimited same-day re-buying is allowed, the optimal profit is simply the sum of every upward price step, since any long rise decomposes into consecutive daily gains.
hints: With no limit on the number of transactions, ask what every individual price increase is worth to you.
Capturing every consecutive rise is never worse than holding across a dip, because you could always re-buy at the dip.
Add up max(0, prices[i] - prices[i-1]) over the whole array; that total equals the best achievable profit.

edge_inputs.description: monotone increase is one long rise summed as daily steps
min to max in a single step

stress.description: long random price series with many small swings
